{'sql': 'SELECT 
    c.ContId AS continent_id,
    c.Continent AS continent_name,
    COUNT(co.CountryId) AS number_of_countries
FROM 
    continents c

    countries co ON c.ContId = co.Continent
GROUP BY 
    c.ContId, c.Continent
ORDER BY 
    number_of_countries DESC;'}

SELECT 
    c.ContId AS continent_id,
    c.Continent AS continent_name,
    COUNT(co.CountryId) AS number_of_countries
FROM 
    continents c
LEFT JOIN 
    countries co ON c.ContId = co.Continent
GROUP BY 
    c.ContId, c.Continent
ORDER BY 
    number_of_countries DESC;

    c.Continent AS continent_name,
    COUNT(co.CountryId) AS number_of_countries

    continents c

    countries co ON c.ContId = co.Continent
GROUP BY 
    c.ContId, c.Continent
ORDER BY 
    number_of_countries DESC;"}

    continents c

GROUP BY 
    c.ContId, c.Continent
ORDER BY 
    number_of_countries DESC;"}

SELECT 
    c.ContId AS continent_id,
    c.Continent AS continent_name,
    COUNT(co.CountryId) AS number_of_countries
FROM 
    continents c
LEFT JOIN 
    countries co ON c.ContId = co.Continent
GROUP BY 
    c.ContId, c.Continent
ORDER BY 
    number_of_countries DESC;
final.answer_text: Europe has the most countries (6), followed by America (3), and Asia, Africa, and Australia each have 2 countries.
